# MixReflect

> A free peer-to-peer music feedback marketplace. Artists upload tracks, review others in their genre, and earn credits for structured honest feedback. Genre-matched, artist-to-artist.

MixReflect is a two-sided marketplace where music producers and artists exchange structured feedback on each other's tracks. The platform uses a credit system: every review you write earns one credit, which you spend to receive a review on your own music.

## How It Works

1. Sign up free — you receive 1 credit, no credit card required
2. Upload a track to the review queue
3. Genre-matched artists on the platform claim and review your track
4. Reviews are gated: reviewers must listen for a minimum of 3 minutes, meet a word count, and include specific, actionable signals before submitting
5. Patterns across multiple reviews surface consistent issues (e.g. if 4 out of 5 reviewers flag the same problem, it shows up as a pattern — not just one opinion)
6. Reviewers are rated after each review; low-quality reviewers lose access

## Pricing

- **Free (forever)**: 1 track in review queue at a time, earn unlimited credits by reviewing others, full analytics dashboard, public track sharing page. No credit card required.
- **Pro — $9.99/month**: 3 tracks in review queue at once, 20 credits added to your account monthly, priority queue placement, Pro badge. Cancel anytime.

There is no $12 plan. There are no paid-per-review tiers for artists.

## Key Features

- Genre-matched peer reviews — reviewers are matched by genre, not randomly assigned
- Minimum 3-minute listen enforced via heartbeat API before review submission is allowed
- Structured feedback with quality gates: word count, specific signal detection, timestamps
- Pattern detection across multiple reviews to identify consistent issues
- Public track pages for sharing and discovery (each track gets its own shareable URL)
- 3D music discovery space at /discover — tracks appear as floating album art in a navigable space
- A/B track testing — artists can submit two versions of a track and compare feedback
- Daily chart with community voting
- Full analytics dashboard for all users including free tier

## What It Is Not

- MixReflect is not a playlist pitching service (unlike SubmitHub or Groover)
- Reviewers are not paid curators or industry professionals — they are genre-matched peers and artists
- There is no "Save Rate" or "Replay Value" metric — these features do not exist on the platform
- The Pro plan does not include track monetization or sales features

## Who It Is For

Music producers, beatmakers, and independent artists who want honest, structured feedback from genre-matched peers. The platform is genre-agnostic — electronic, hip-hop, indie, pop, and other genres are all active on the platform.

## Stats (as of 2025)

- 2,847+ tracks reviewed
- Average turnaround under 4 hours
- 1,200+ artists in the community

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://mixreflect.com
- Review queue: https://mixreflect.com/review
- Discover (3D music space): https://mixreflect.com/discover
- Pricing: https://mixreflect.com/#pricing
- Support: https://mixreflect.com/support
- Terms: https://mixreflect.com/terms
- Privacy: https://mixreflect.com/privacy
